title: Harvest Skillet — Storm
summary: Harvest skillet in storm; built in Italy for daily use.

content.text:
# Harvest Skillet — Storm

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Harvest Skillet — Storm is designed for the long haul, with kitchen-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Italy.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.
